title: The Power of Renewable Energy
passage:
What is Renewable Energy?

Renewable energy is energy from natural sources. These sources can be used again and again. Examples of renewable energy are sunlight, wind, and water. They give us power without polluting the air.

Types of Renewable Energy

There are many types of renewable energy. Solar energy comes from the sun. Wind energy comes from the wind. Hydropower comes from water. Each type has its own benefits.

Why Use Renewable Energy?

Using renewable energy helps the environment. It produces less pollution. This is better for our planet. Also, renewable energy can help reduce the cost of electricity.

Future of Renewable Energy

Many countries are using more renewable energy. This is important for our future. It can create jobs and help people save money. We should all support renewable energy!
